live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

ledger_id.description: The id of the ledger that this ledger account settlement belongs to.

description.description: The description of the ledger account settlement.

status.description: The status of the ledger account settlement. One of `processing`, `pending`, `posted`, `archiving` or `archived`.

settled_ledger_account_id.description: The id of the settled ledger account whose ledger entries are queried against, and its balance is reduced as a result.

contra_ledger_account_id.description: The id of the contra ledger account that sends to or receives funds from the settled ledger account.

effective_at_upper_bound.description: The exclusive upper bound of the effective_at timestamp of the ledger entries to be included in the ledger account settlement. The default value is the created_at timestamp of the ledger account settlement.

ledger_transaction_id.description: The id of the ledger transaction that this settlement is associated with.

amount.description: The amount of the ledger account settlement.

settlement_entry_direction.description: The direction of the ledger entry with the settlement_ledger_account.

currency.description: The currency of the ledger account settlement.

currency_exponent.description: The currency exponent of the ledger account settlement.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.
